description: Enable workspace admins to invite members, manage roles, revoke access, and review membership audit history.

userStories.title: Add membership invitation and audit persistence
userStories.description: As a product team, I want membership and audit records stored consistently so that admin changes are durable and traceable.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace membership data stores role and access state for each member
Audit records can capture invite, role change, and revoke membership events
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend member invitation flow
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email so that new collaborators can join without direct database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Invite action validates email and requested workspace role
Creating an invite records an audit event for the membership change
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend member role change flow
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin so that permissions stay accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: Role change action only accepts viewer, editor, and admin roles
Successful role changes persist the new role and record an audit event
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend member access revocation flow
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so that former collaborators no longer retain permissions.
acceptanceCriteria: Revocation action removes or disables workspace access for the selected member
Revoking access records an audit event for the membership change
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add workspace settings member management panel
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want invite, role change, and revoke controls in workspace settings so that I can manage membership from one UI surface.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings shows invite form and per-member role and revoke controls
Submitting any membership control reflects the persisted result in the settings view
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add membership audit log view in workspace settings
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can confirm who was invited, updated, or removed.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings displays recent membership audit entries with actor, action, and timestamp
Audit view refreshes after invite, role change, and revoke actions
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
